name: hud_ui_background_set_enabled
description: HudUiBackground::SetEnabled starts configured background sounds and invalidates children when enabling, and stops active handles when disabling.
known_limits: The smoke runs with the sound backend disabled, so zSndSample::PlayA3DSimple returns null; direct callee coverage validates the sound start provider path.
Binary-safe verification is deferred to a coherent HUD background class pass.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4b9850 validates the enabled path over 10 background sound entries, optional PlayA3DSimple calls, child invalidation, and HudUiBackgroundContainer::SetEnabled delegation.
Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4b9850 validates the disabled path over 10 play handles, optional StopIfActive calls, handle clearing, and base enabled-state delegation.
The native smoke validates enabling stores the base enabled state and invalidates both child elements, then disabling clears active play handles and stores the disabled state.
